content: Transfer credits from your {{productName}} wallet to {{organizationName}} AI. If your wallet is empty, top it up first. Credits never expire.

comment.text: This translation key provides a description for the first step in an AI onboarding process. It instructs users to transfer credits from their wallet to the AI service, explains what to do if the wallet is empty, and notes that credits don't expire. This text appears as a description within the "Get Started" section of the AI service panel.

usage.context: {t("AIGetStartedStep1Description", { productName: t("Common:ProductName"), organizationName: logoText, })}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'doludun' is a grammatical error/typo. It should be 'doldurun' (top up/fill) to match the imperative tone and correct meaning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: {{productName}} cüzdanınızdan {{organizationName}} AI-ya kreditləri köçürün. Cüzdanınız boşdursa, əvvəlcə doldurun. Kreditlər heç vaxt bitmir.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The last sentence 'Кредитите никога не изграждат' translates to 'Credits never build', which is a complete mistranslation of 'Credits never expire'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Прехвърлете кредити от портфейла ви {{productName}} към {{organizationName}} AI. Ако портфейлът ви е празен, попълнете го първо. Кредитите никога не изтичат.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'neuznikají' (do not arise/occur) is used instead of 'nevyprší' (do not expire). In the context of credits, 'neuznikají' is semantically incorrect.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Přesun kreditu z vaší peněženky {{productName}} do {{organizationName}} AI. Pokud je vaše peněženka prázdná, nejprve ji doplňte. Kredity nikdy nevyprší.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'expire' is translated as 'վակայվում' (vakayum), which is not a valid Armenian word or a correct translation for 'expire'. The correct term should be 'ժամկետանցնել' (zhamketantsnel).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Անցկացրեք վարկային միավորներ ձեր {{productName}} պորտֆելից դեպի {{organizationName}} AI։ Եթե ձեր պորտֆելը դատարկ է, նախ լցրեք այն։ Վարկային միավորները երբեք ժամկետանց չեն լինում։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'top it up' as 'doplatte' (pay more/settle) is contextually weak, but more critically, 'Kredity nikdy neplynú' means 'Credits never flow/run', which is a complete mistranslation of 'Credits never expire'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Preveďte kredity zo svojho peňaženky {{productName}} do {{organizationName}} AI. Ak je vaša peňaženka prázdna, najprv ju dobuďte. Kredity nikdy neexpirujú.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'matični račun' (master/main account) is used instead of 'denarnica' (wallet), which changes the technical meaning of the source text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Prenesite kredite iz svoje {{productName}} denarnice v {{organizationName}} AI. Če je vaša denarnica prazna, jo najprej napolnite. Krediti ne zastarejo.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'nunca' is Spanish, not Albanian. The correct Albanian word for 'never' is 'kurrë'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Transferoni kredite nga portofoli juaj {{productName}} në {{organizationName}} AI. Nëse portofoli juaj është bosh, mbushni më parë. Kredite kurrë nuk skadojnë.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'wallet' is incorrectly transliterated as 'гелтија' (geltija) and 'гелтиј' (geltij), which are not valid Serbian words. The correct term is 'novčanik'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Преместите кредите са вашег {{productName}} новчаника у {{organizationName}} AI. Ако је ваш новчаник празан, прво га пополните. Кредити никада не истеку.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'sürmez' is used incorrectly for 'never expire'. In Turkish, 'sürmez' usually refers to duration or something not lasting/continuing, whereas 'expire' in the context of credits/validity should be 'son kullanma tarihi geçmez' or 'geçersiz kalmaz'. 'Asla sürmez' sounds unnatural and conveys the wrong meaning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kredileri {{productName}} cüzdanınızdan {{organizationName}} Yapay Zekasına aktarın. Cüzdanınız boşsa, önce bakiye yükleyin. Kredilerin kullanım süresi asla dolmaz.
